rationale: Both correctly restore the sequence—staffing first, uncertain demand second, fulfillment as an outcome—and avoid unsupported empirical claims. B offers slightly clearer managerial scaffolding and explicitly marks unspecified model elements, but its readiness rubric, gate table, and repeated role summary are excessive for the requested concise repair. A delivers the same essential diagnosis and a directly reusable replacement with less overhead. Neither has a material fidelity defect.
